docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,999.89 FILED BY WESCOTT, CARL AS TO DEFENDANT STEPHENS, MONETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
